label: 29_speaker necessarily_speech speaker_reflect bis_expressed speech
description: Jean-Claude Trichet, former President of the European Central Bank, delivered key speeches on financial stability, EMU reform, and economic integration during his tenure. These addresses highlighted policy challenges and future directions for Europe's monetary system.
